title: Elon Musk’s Grok ordered to stop creating AI nudes by Dutch court as legal pressure mounts
summary_full: A Dutch court issued a $115,000 penalty for every day xAI fails to remove non-consensual AI-generated nude images created by its chatbot Grok.
summary_public: A Dutch court issued a $115,000 penalty for every day xAI fails to remove non-consensual AI-generated nude images created by its chatbot Grok.
